subcodes.first_line: O Sharaf! We have hearkened unto thy call, and in response have graciously revealed these wondrous and sublime verses unto all the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا شرف ندایت را شنیدیم و باین آیات بدیعه منیعه جواب عنایت فرمودیم جمیع عالم
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
